title: Best Hotels in Pattaya
meta_description: Curated Pattaya hotel guide with central, north-side, and resort-led stays backed by official hotel sources.
intro: Pattaya hotels make more sense when you choose them by area fit rather than by raw star rating. Central Pattaya works for convenience and short stays, north Pattaya and Naklua work better for resort or Sanctuary planning, and the Pratumnak side makes more sense if you want a more self-contained coastal resort feel.

items.name: Hilton Pattaya
items.description: One of the strongest central Pattaya hotel answers if you want direct mall-and-beach-road convenience without giving up full-service upscale comfort.
items.current_info: Best if your Pattaya trip is short and convenience matters more than seclusion.

items.name: InterContinental Pattaya Resort
items.description: A better fit if you want resort seclusion and a more self-contained stay rather than a central strip hotel.
items.current_info: More useful for a resort-led Pattaya stay than for a quick nightlife-centric visit.

items.name: Dusit Thani Pattaya
items.description: A long-running Pattaya resort choice that works well if you want a full-service north-side stay near the city but away from the busiest late-night core.
items.current_info: A better fit for balanced city-and-resort trips than for purely nightlife-led stays.

items.name: Grande Centre Point Pattaya
items.description: A practical modern hotel if your Pattaya trip prioritizes shopping, city convenience, and family-friendly facilities over a classic resort atmosphere.
items.current_info: Useful when location and practical amenities matter more than a traditional beach-resort mood.

items.name: Avani Pattaya Resort
items.description: A balanced central Pattaya resort choice if you want greenery and hotel comfort close to the main action without sleeping directly inside the busiest nightlife strip.
items.current_info: A useful compromise if you want central Pattaya access with more resort atmosphere than a pure city tower.
